download.urlPlaceholder: Paste download links, one per line for batch…
download.addTorrent: Open torrent file or paste magnet link
download.noTasks: No downloads yet. Paste a link above to start.
download.urlHint: Paste a full download URL (e.g. https://…), not a bare filename

cookie.title: Import Cookies
cookie.desc: Extract cookies from your browser for authenticated downloads from cloud drives or video platforms. The cookie header is sent to the download engine with each request.
cookie.failed: Import failed. Make sure the browser is closed and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.dhtDesc: Enables P2P peer discovery for magnet links and torrent files.
settings.proxyDesc: When started, HTTP download requests will be intercepted and accelerated with multi-threading. Configure your system proxy to this address.
